gain_scheduling._comment: Attitude gain scheduling: decrease P and increase D as yaw rate increases

_comments.attitude: Attitude loop gains - convert attitude errors to desired body rates
_comments.ndi_rate: NDI rate controller - main rate control (inverse dynamics)
_comments.feedback_rate: Feedback correction - residual rate feedback for robustness
_comments.indi: Incremental NDI - blend_ratio: 0=pure NDI, 1=pure INDI, alpha filters for robustness
_comments.limits: Safety limits for accelerations and tilt angles
_comments.yaw_ff: Yaw feedforward prediction - dt_base: base horizon, dt_gain: additional per rad/s, dt_max: safety limit, lpf_alpha: gyro LPF, torque_r_offset_gain: linear yaw torque offset per rad/s yaw rate
